candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current asset component, not the total; less appropriate than the exact total line.
Wrong section of assets; not current assets.

candidates.row_label: Disposals of non-current assets (net of earn-out consideration)
candidates.why: Cash flow investing line, unrelated to current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact match for cash and cash equivalents on the balance sheet.
Potential cash line but blank and less standard than the exact reported cash-equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Total cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow closing balance, useful cross-check but balance sheet line is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning-of-period cash, not balance sheet current-year position.
Not cash balance.
Cash flow detail, not cash balance.
Not a cash balance line.

variables.notes: Used the exact balance sheet cash line.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Only a component/subtotal of current liabilities, not the total.
Non-current, not current liabilities.
Wrong maturity bucket.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best clean current debt total and excludes lease wording; appropriate for short-term debt.
Would capture current portion of long-term debt if nonzero, but reported as zero here and may overlap conceptually with short-term borrowings if totals changed across years.

variables.notes: STD under IFRS should include financing-related current debt excluding leases. 'Short-term borrowings' is likely the main total, but the presence of separate 'commercial papers' and 'current loans from credit Institutions' creates possible overlap in some years. Included the apparent component set plus current maturities line, but this may double count if 'Short-term borrowings' already includes the components.

candidates.why: Exact current tax payable/current tax liabilities line on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Other taxes and social security expenses
candidates.why: Contains payroll/social charges and other taxes, not specifically income taxes payable.
Non-current/deferred taxes, not taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Tax asset, opposite sign/category.

variables.notes: Chose a confident exact match outside the shortlist; current tax liabilities correspond to taxes payable.

candidates.why: Exact reported PPE line; preferred net/total PPE measure.

candidates.row_label: Property Plant and Equipment - Balancing value
candidates.why: Appears to be a balancing-derived line rather than the primary reported PPE line.
Gross PPE, but blank and less preferred than the direct reported PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Net
candidates.why: Lease right-of-use assets are not the preferred total PPE measure.
Wrong asset category.

candidates.row_label: Investments in property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Capex flow, not stock of PPE.

variables.notes: Selected the primary reported PPE stock line, which is preferable to gross or balancing values.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet.
Exact net cash flow from operating activities line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not the final operating cash flow figure.

variables.notes: Selected the final net operating cash flow line, not the subtotal before working-capital changes.
